test_cases.test_case: Hotels tab — successful search redirects to Hotels results page
preconditions: User is on the Home page (landing page) with the Hotels tab selected and ready to enter required search criteria.
User role: <role>
steps: 1. Enter <destination> in the Destination field
2. Select <check-in date> in the Check-in Date field
3. Select <check-out date> in the Check-out Date field
4. Enter <number of rooms> in the Number of Rooms field
5. Enter <number of adults> in Guests > Adults
6. Enter <number of children> in Guests > Children
7. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Redirects to the corresponding results listing page for the active tab; the Hotels results listing page is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Flights tab — successful round-trip search redirects to Flights results page
preconditions: User is on the Home page (landing page) with the Flights tab selected and ready to enter required search criteria.
User role: <role>
steps: 1. Select <Round-trip> from the Trip Type dropdown
2. Enter <departure city> in the Departure City field
3. Enter <arrival city> in the Arrival City field
4. Select <departure date> in the Departure Date field
5. Select <return date> in the Return Date field
6. Enter <number of adults> in Passenger Count > Adults
7. Enter <number of children> in Passenger Count > Children
8. Enter <number of infants> in Passenger Count > Infants
9. Select <cabin class> from the Cabin Class dropdown
10. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Redirects to the corresponding results listing page for the active tab; the Flights results listing page is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Tours tab — successful search redirects to Tours results page

steps: 1. Enter <destination> in the Destination field
2. Select <start date> in the Start Date field
3. Select <end date> in the End Date field
4. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Redirects to the corresponding results listing page for the active tab; the Tours results listing page is displayed.

6. Enter <valid Guests.Adults> in Guests -> Adults
7. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Check_Out_Date field displays an inline validation error indicating it must be after Check_In_Date; the Search does not submit and the user remains on the Home page.

test_cases.test_case: Flights (Round-trip): Return_Date earlier than Departure_Date

4. Enter <valid Arrival_City> in Arrival_City
5. Enter <date A> in Departure_Date
6. Enter <earlier date B> in Return_Date where <date B> is before <date A>
7. Fill required passenger counts with <valid numeric values> for Adults
8. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Return_Date field displays an inline validation error indicating it must be after Departure_Date for round-trip searches; the Search is blocked and no redirect occurs.

test_cases.test_case: Tours: End_Date earlier than Start_Date (date-range constraint violation)

test_cases.test_case: Cars: Drop-Off Date/Time earlier than Pick-Up Date/Time (date-time range violation)

test_cases.test_case: Hotels: Check-out equal to Check-in (same-day) is rejected

5. Click Search

test_cases.test_case: Flights (Round-trip): Return date equal to Departure date (same-day round-trip) is accepted

test_cases.test_case: Flights (Round-trip): Return date one day before Departure date is rejected

test_cases.test_case: Flights Departure_City with leading and trailing whitespace is trimmed

test_cases.test_case: After successful Hotels search, press browser Back — previously entered search values are preserved

4. Set Check-Out_Date to one day after Check-In_Date

test_cases.expected_result: The Home page search widget is shown and the Hotels search fields retain the previously entered values (Destination, Check-In_Date, Check-Out_Date are prefilled with the values used in the prior search); user may re-submit or edit without needing to re-enter those values

test_cases.test_case: Register successfully and get automatically logged in (redirect to dashboard)

The email to be used is not already registered in the system
steps: 1. From the Home page click Account / Login
2. Click the Register / Create account option to open the registration form
3. Enter <valid first name> in the First Name field
4. Enter <valid last name> in the Last Name field
5. Enter <valid, unique email> in the Email field
6. Enter <valid password> in the Password field
7. Enter the same <valid password> in the Confirm Password field
8. Select <mobile country code> from the Mobile Country Code dropdown
9. Enter <valid mobile number> in the Mobile Number field
10. Enter <address> in the Address field
11. Select <country> from the Country field
12. Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox
13. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: The browser is redirected to the User Dashboard; the dashboard page is displayed and the account area (account menu or user avatar) is visible confirming the user is logged in.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to use the Register action while already authenticated (precondition not met)
preconditions: User is authenticated (logged in) and navigates to the Registration page
steps: 1. Log in as an existing authenticated user.
2. Navigate to the Registration page (attempt to access Home -> Account/Login -> Register).
3. Observe whether the Register button or registration form is present.
4. If the Register button is present, attempt to fill required fields with <valid values> and click Register.
test_cases.expected_result: Register action is blocked due to precondition (user must be unauthenticated): the Register button is not visible or the registration form cannot be submitted while authenticated; no new account is created. The user is prevented from completing registration while logged in (no redirect to account-creation flow).

test_cases.test_case: Email uniqueness enforced regardless of case (case-variant re-registration blocked)

7. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: Registration is blocked; Email displays an inline error indicating the email is already in use (uniqueness enforced irrespective of case). No second account is created.

test_cases.test_case: CAPTCHA present but entered value is invalid
preconditions: User is not authenticated
CAPTCHA is displayed on the Login page (after multiple consecutive failed attempts)
steps: 1. Enter <valid email> in the Email field
2. Enter <valid password> in the Password field
3. Enter <incorrect captcha> in the Captcha field
4. Click the Login button
test_cases.expected_result: Captcha field displays an inline validation error indicating the entered CAPTCHA value is invalid; the form does not submit; user remains unauthenticated.

test_cases.test_case: Google social login option not shown when provider is disabled
preconditions: User is not authenticated
Google social login is disabled
steps: 1. Navigate to the Login page
test_cases.expected_result: Google login button is not visible on the Login page; no Google social login option is presented to the user.

test_cases.test_case: Authenticated user attempts to access Login page (form precondition fails)
preconditions: User is authenticated
steps: 1. As an authenticated user, navigate to Account / Login
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected away from the Login page (for example to the Dashboard or previous page); the Login form is not displayed; no login attempt is performed.

test_cases.test_case: After multiple consecutive failed attempts, CAPTCHA appears before any input (constraint timing)
preconditions: User is not authenticated
steps: 1. Repeatedly submit invalid credentials for <multiple consecutive failed attempts> to trigger the CAPTCHA requirement
2. Open or reload the Login page after those failures
test_cases.expected_result: CAPTCHA field is visible on the Login page before any user input; the UI indicates CAPTCHA is required when present; attempting to submit without completing CAPTCHA will be blocked.

test_cases.test_case: CAPTCHA not present on the attempt immediately before it becomes required
preconditions: User is not authenticated
Tester has access to a valid account for credential checks
steps: 1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Enter an invalid email in the Email field
3. Enter an invalid password in the Password field
4. Click the Login button
5. Repeat steps 2-4 until the CAPTCHA has not yet appeared but you are one attempt before the system would require it (stop when there is still no CAPTCHA visible)
test_cases.expected_result: The final login attempt is blocked with the visible error 'Invalid credentials'; the CAPTCHA is not visible; the Password field is cleared. (is blocked / error shown)

test_cases.test_case: When CAPTCHA is required, submitting valid credentials without completing CAPTCHA is blocked
preconditions: User is not authenticated
CAPTCHA is visible and marked required after reaching the consecutive-failure threshold
steps: 1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Ensure the CAPTCHA field is visible (reach this state by performing failed login attempts until CAPTCHA appears)
3. Enter a valid account Email in the Email field
4. Enter the correct Password for that account in the Password field
5. Leave the CAPTCHA field empty
6. Click the Login button
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is blocked; a visible error indicates CAPTCHA verification is required (no redirect occurs); the Password field is cleared and the user remains unauthenticated. (is blocked / error shown)

test_cases.test_case: Successful login when valid credentials and valid CAPTCHA are provided exactly when CAPTCHA is required
preconditions: User is not authenticated
CAPTCHA is visible and required after reaching the consecutive-failure threshold
steps: 1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Ensure the CAPTCHA field is visible (reach this state by performing failed login attempts until CAPTCHA appears)
3. Enter a valid account Email in the Email field
4. Enter the correct Password for that account in the Password field
5. Complete the CAPTCHA correctly
6. Click the Login button
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; user is redirected to the dashboard or the previously requested page and is authenticated. (succeeds)

test_cases.test_case: Email with leading and trailing whitespace is accepted (trimmed) during authentication
preconditions: User is not authenticated
Tester knows valid account credentials
steps: 1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Enter the valid account Email with leading and trailing whitespace characters into the Email field
3. Enter the correct Password for that account in the Password field
4. Click the Login button
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; user is redirected to the dashboard or previous page and is authenticated (authentication behaves as if leading/trailing whitespace on the Email was trimmed). (succeeds)

test_cases.test_case: Double-clicking the Login button with valid credentials does not cause duplicate submissions or double navigation
preconditions: User is not authenticated
Tester has a valid account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Enter a valid Email in the Email field
3. Enter the correct Password in the Password field
4. Quickly double-click the Login button (two clicks in rapid succession)
test_cases.expected_result: Only a single login submission is processed; the form submits successfully once and the user is redirected once to the dashboard or previous page; no duplicate navigation or duplicate session creation is observed. (succeeds)

test_cases.test_case: Request password reset with known email shows confirmation about sent link and expiry
preconditions: User is unauthenticated and has access to the Account/Login area and the email address associated with their account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Account/Login area
2. Click the 'Forgot Password' link to open the Forgot Password page
3. Enter <registered email> in the Email field
4. Click the 'Reset Password' button
test_cases.expected_result: A confirmation message is displayed stating that a password reset link has been sent to the provided email and that the link expires after 24 hours (i.e., sends a password reset link to the provided email (link expires after 24 hours) and shows a confirmation message).

test_cases.test_case: Complete password reset via valid token redirects to Login with success message
preconditions: User is unauthenticated and is on the Password Reset page with a valid, non-expired reset link (token)
steps: 1. On the Password Reset page, enter <new password> in the New Password field
2. Enter <new password> in the Confirm New Password field (matching)
3. Click the 'Change Password' button
test_cases.expected_result: The Login page is displayed and a visible success message is shown; this corresponds to the workflow outcome: updates the user's password and redirects to the Login page with a success message.

test_cases.test_case: Submit unknown email address
preconditions: Unauthenticated user is on the Forgot Password page
steps: 1. Navigate to the Forgot Password page
2. Enter <unknown email address> in the Email field
3. Click the Reset Password button
test_cases.expected_result: An inline or page-level error appears indicating the email address was not found (Email field shows an error that the address is not recognized); the form remains editable; no reset email is sent and the user is not redirected.

test_cases.test_case: Enter invalid email format and submit
preconditions: Unauthenticated user is on the Forgot Password page
steps: 1. Navigate to the Forgot Password page
2. Enter <invalid email format> in the Email field
3. Click the Reset Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Email field displays an inline validation error indicating the value is not a valid email address; the form does not submit; no confirmation message is shown and no reset email is sent.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt password reset while authenticated (precondition violation)
preconditions: User is authenticated (signed in)
steps: 1. Sign in as <authenticated user>
2. Attempt to navigate to the Forgot Password page (or click the Forgot Password link)
3. If the Forgot Password page is reachable, enter <known email address> and click Reset Password
test_cases.expected_result: Reset Password action is blocked due to failed precondition: the UI prevents the flow for authenticated users (user is either redirected away from the Forgot Password page or the Reset Password control is not actionable). No reset email is sent and no confirmation is shown.

test_cases.test_case: Leave required password fields blank on reset page and submit
preconditions: User has opened the Password Reset page via a valid (non-expired) reset link
steps: 1. Navigate to the Password Reset page using a <valid reset token>
2. Do not enter any value into the New_Password field
3. Do not enter any value into the Confirm_New_Password field
4. Click the Change Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation errors appear on New_Password and Confirm_New_Password indicating they are required; the form does not submit; the user's password is not changed and the user is not redirected to the Login page.

test_cases.test_case: Confirm password does not match New Password
preconditions: User has opened the Password Reset page via a valid (non-expired) reset link
steps: 1. Navigate to the Password Reset page using a <valid reset token>
2. Enter <new password> in the New_Password field
3. Enter <different password> in the Confirm_New_Password field
4. Click the Change Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Confirm_New_Password field displays an inline validation error stating it must match New_Password; the form does not submit; the user's password is not changed and the user remains on the Password Reset page.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to change password with an expired or invalid reset token
preconditions: User navigates to the Password Reset page using an <expired or invalid reset token>
steps: 1. Navigate to the Password Reset page using an <expired or invalid reset token>
2. Enter <new password> in the New_Password field
3. Enter the same <new password> in the Confirm_New_Password field
4. Click the Change Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Change Password action is blocked because the reset token is invalid or expired: the page shows an error message indicating the reset link is invalid or has expired; the password is not updated; the user is not redirected to Login.

test_cases.test_case: Use reset link issued exactly 24 hours ago (expiry boundary)
preconditions: A password reset link was issued for the account exactly 24 hours before the test action
steps: 1. Open the password reset link that was issued exactly 24 hours ago
2. Observe the page presented after clicking the link
test_cases.expected_result: The password reset action is blocked; a visible error is shown indicating the reset link has expired and the Change Password form does not allow entering a new password (is blocked / error shown).

test_cases.test_case: Use reset link just under the 24-hour expiry (boundary pass)
preconditions: A password reset link was issued for the account 23 hours 59 minutes (or any small delta less than 24 hours) before the test action
steps: 1. Open the password reset link that was issued 23 hours 59 minutes ago
2. Enter a value into New_Password
3. Enter the identical value into Confirm_New_Password
4. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Password change succeeds; the system updates the user's password and redirects to the Login page with a visible success message (succeeds).

test_cases.test_case: Confirm_New_Password exactly matches New_Password (equality boundary pass)
preconditions: Tester has a valid, unexpired reset link and is on the Change Password page
steps: 1. Enter New_Password with a chosen value
2. Enter Confirm_New_Password with exactly the same value (byte-for-byte identical)
3. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Password change succeeds; the user is redirected to the Login page with a success message and the new password is accepted (succeeds).

test_cases.test_case: Confirm_New_Password differs by one character from New_Password (equality boundary fail)
preconditions: Tester has a valid, unexpired reset link and is on the Change Password page
steps: 1. Enter New_Password with a chosen value
2. Enter Confirm_New_Password with a value that differs by only one character from New_Password
3. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is blocked; Confirm_New_Password displays an inline error indicating it must match New_Password and the password is not changed (is blocked / error shown).

test_cases.test_case: Email input with leading and trailing whitespace around a known account email (trimming behavior)
preconditions: An account exists for the user's email address the tester controls
steps: 1. On the Forgot Password form, enter the account email with leading and trailing whitespace added
2. Click Reset Password
3. Observe the confirmation or error shown
test_cases.expected_result: Whitespace is trimmed and the reset request succeeds: a confirmation message is shown indicating a reset link was sent (succeeds).

test_cases.test_case: Email input containing emoji/unicode characters (format edge)
preconditions: Tester is on the Forgot Password form
steps: 1. Enter an email value that includes emoji/unicode characters in the local-part or domain
2. Click Reset Password
3. Observe inline validation or error messages
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is blocked; the Email field shows a visible format validation error and the reset request is not sent (is blocked / error shown).

test_cases.test_case: Perform a hotel search with destination and dates
preconditions: User is on the Home or Hotels section and prepared to enter search parameters (destination and dates)
User is <role>
steps: 1. Enter <destination> in the Destination field
2. Select <check-in date> in the Check_In field
3. Select <check-out date> in the Check_Out field
4. Enter <number of rooms> in Number_Of_Rooms
5. Enter <adults> in Adults and <children> in Children
6. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to Hotels_Listing_Page and the Hotels Listing page is displayed showing hotel cards with name, location, star rating, thumbnail image, starting price per night, amenity icons, and a Book Now button for each card

test_cases.test_case: Adjust minimum price filter updates listing dynamically
preconditions: Hotels_Listing_Page is displayed with search results (user has performed a search)
User is <role>
steps: 1. In the Left Sidebar Filters, expand the Price Range group if collapsed
2. Enter <Min_Price> in the Min_Price field
test_cases.expected_result: updates results dynamically: Hotels listing displays only hotels with nightly starting price at or above <Min_Price>; the Active Filters Bar shows a Price Range or Min_Price chip reflecting the applied constraint

test_cases.test_case: Adjust maximum price filter updates listing dynamically
preconditions: Hotels_Listing_Page is displayed with search results (user has performed a search)
User is <role>
steps: 1. In the Left Sidebar Filters, expand the Price Range group if collapsed
2. Enter <Max_Price> in the Max_Price field
test_cases.expected_result: updates results dynamically: Hotels listing displays only hotels with nightly starting price at or below <Max_Price>; the Active Filters Bar shows a Price Range or Max_Price chip reflecting the applied constraint

test_cases.test_case: Change star rating filter and verify listing updates
preconditions: Hotels_Listing_Page is displayed with search results (user has performed a search)
User is <role>
steps: 1. In the Left Sidebar Filters, expand the Star Rating filter group if collapsed
2. Select the desired <Star_Rating> option (e.g., check the 4-star checkbox)
test_cases.expected_result: updates results dynamically: Hotels listing displays only hotels matching the selected <Star_Rating> filter; an active star rating chip appears in the Active Filters Bar

test_cases.test_case: Toggle a facilities/amenity filter and verify results update
preconditions: Hotels_Listing_Page is displayed with search results (user has performed a search)
User is <role>
steps: 1. In the Left Sidebar Filters, expand the Facilities/Amenities group if collapsed
2. Toggle on (select) the <Facility/Amenity> checkbox (e.g., pool, free Wi-Fi)
3. Observe the listing update
test_cases.expected_result: updates results dynamically: Hotels listing displays only hotels that include the selected <Facility/Amenity> (amenity icons for that facility are visible on each listed hotel); an amenity chip appears in the Active Filters Bar

test_cases.test_case: Select a hotel type filter and verify listing updates
preconditions: Hotels_Listing_Page is displayed with search results (user has performed a search)
User is <role>
steps: 1. In the Left Sidebar Filters, expand the Hotel Type group if collapsed
2. Select the desired <Hotel_Type> option
test_cases.expected_result: updates results dynamically: Hotels listing displays only hotels of the selected <Hotel_Type>; an active Hotel Type chip appears in the Active Filters Bar

test_cases.test_case: Select a board basis filter and verify listing updates
preconditions: Hotels_Listing_Page is displayed with search results (user has performed a search)
User is <role>
steps: 1. In the Left Sidebar Filters, expand the Board Basis group if collapsed
2. Select the desired <Board_Basis> option (e.g., Room Only, Bed & Breakfast)
test_cases.expected_result: updates results dynamically: Hotels listing displays only hotels matching the selected <Board_Basis>; an active Board Basis chip appears in the Active Filters Bar

test_cases.test_case: Remove an individual active filter via Active Filters Bar
preconditions: Hotels_Listing_Page is displayed with search results and at least one active filter present in the Active Filters Bar
User is <role>
steps: 1. Identify the active filter chip for <Filter_Key> in the Active Filters Bar
2. Click the Remove (X) control on the <Filter_Key> chip
test_cases.expected_result: removes the specified filter and updates results dynamically: the <Filter_Key> chip is no longer visible in the Active Filters Bar and the Hotels listing updates to include hotels previously excluded by that filter

test_cases.test_case: Reset all filters clears active filters and restores full results
preconditions: Hotels_Listing_Page is displayed with search results and multiple active filters applied
User is <role>
steps: 1. Click the Reset all control in the Active Filters Bar
test_cases.expected_result: clears all filters and updates results dynamically: no active filter chips remain in the Active Filters Bar and the Hotels listing displays the full unfiltered set of search results

test_cases.test_case: Change sort order and verify results reorder dynamically
preconditions: Hotels_Listing_Page is displayed with search results
User is <role>
steps: 1. Open the Sort_By dropdown control
2. Select 'Price: Low to High' from the Sort_By options
test_cases.expected_result: reorders results dynamically: hotels in the Hotels listing are rearranged in ascending order by starting price (visible hotel cards appear ordered by increasing starting price)

test_cases.test_case: Initiate booking from a listing via Book Now
preconditions: Hotels_Listing_Page is displayed with search results
User is <role>
steps: 1. On a visible hotel card in the Hotels listing, click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: initiates Hotel Details & Booking entry point and the Hotel Details & Booking page or booking entry UI is displayed for the selected hotel

test_cases.test_case: Submit Search with Destination left blank (required text field)
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Search form
steps: 1. Leave the Destination field blank
2. Enter <valid check-in date> into the Check_In field
3. Enter <valid check-out date after check-in> into the Check_Out field
4. Enter <valid numeric> into Number_Of_Rooms
5. Enter <valid numeric> into Adults
6. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Destination field indicating it is required; the form does not submit and the user remains on the Hotels Search form (no redirect to Hotels_Listing_Page)

test_cases.test_case: Submit Search with Check-In date left blank (required date field)
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Search form
steps: 1. Enter <valid destination> into the Destination field
2. Leave the Check_In field blank
3. Enter <valid check-out date> into the Check_Out field
4. Enter <valid numeric> into Number_Of_Rooms
5. Enter <valid numeric> into Adults
6. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Check_In field indicating it is required; the form does not submit and the user remains on the Hotels Search form (no redirect to Hotels_Listing_Page)

test_cases.test_case: Submit Search with all required fields empty (Destination, Check-In, Check-Out)
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Search form
steps: 1. Leave the Destination field blank
2. Leave the Check_In field blank
3. Leave the Check_Out field blank
4. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation errors appear on Destination, Check_In, and Check_Out fields indicating they are required; the form does not submit and the user remains on the Hotels Search form (no redirect to Hotels_Listing_Page)

test_cases.test_case: Enter invalid/impossible date in Check-In field and attempt Search (date format/validation)
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Search form
steps: 1. Enter <valid destination> into the Destination field
2. Enter <invalid/impossible date> into the Check_In field
3. Enter <valid date> into the Check_Out field
4. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Check_In field displays an inline validation error indicating the date is invalid (e.g., 'Invalid date'); the form does not submit and the user remains on the Hotels Search form (no redirect to Hotels_Listing_Page)

test_cases.test_case: Enter non-numeric text into Number_Of_Rooms and attempt Search (numeric field format)
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Search form
steps: 1. Enter <valid destination> into the Destination field
2. Enter <valid date> into the Check_In field
3. Enter <valid date after check-in> into the Check_Out field
4. Enter <non-numeric text> into the Number_Of_Rooms field
5. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Number_Of_Rooms field displays an inline validation error indicating a numeric value is required; the form does not submit and the user remains on the Hotels Search form (no redirect to Hotels_Listing_Page)

test_cases.test_case: Enter non-numeric value into Min_Price filter (filter numeric validation)
preconditions: User has executed a search and is on the Hotels_Listing_Page
steps: 1. Locate the Left_Sidebar_Filters Min_Price input on the Hotels_Listing_Page
2. Enter <non-numeric text> into the Min_Price field
3. Leave focus from the Min_Price field (trigger on_change)
4. Observe results area
test_cases.expected_result: Min_Price field displays an inline validation error indicating a numeric value is required; the results are not updated/apply the invalid filter is not applied (no change in listing caused by the invalid input)

test_cases.test_case: Enter non-numeric value into Max_Price filter (filter numeric validation)
preconditions: User has executed a search and is on the Hotels_Listing_Page
steps: 1. Locate the Left_Sidebar_Filters Max_Price input on the Hotels_Listing_Page
2. Enter <non-numeric text> into the Max_Price field
3. Leave focus from the Max_Price field (trigger on_change)
4. Observe results area
test_cases.expected_result: Max_Price field displays an inline validation error indicating a numeric value is required; the results are not updated/the invalid filter is not applied (no change in listing caused by the invalid input)

test_cases.test_case: Check-In set to today succeeds
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Search form
steps: 1. Open the Hotels Search form
2. Enter <today's date> in the Check_In field
3. Enter <one day after today> in the Check_Out field
4. Enter a valid value in Destination
5. Click the Search action
test_cases.expected_result: Search submits successfully; user is redirected to Hotels_Listing_Page; the search summary on the listing page displays Check-In = <today> and results are returned for the specified dates (succeeds)

test_cases.test_case: Check-In set to yesterday is blocked
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Search form
steps: 1. Open the Hotels Search form
2. Enter <yesterday's date> in the Check_In field
3. Enter a date after <yesterday's date> in the Check_Out field
4. Enter a valid value in Destination
5. Click the Search action
test_cases.expected_result: Search is blocked; the Check_In field displays an inline error (visible next to the field) indicating the date is in the past and must be corrected before search can proceed (is blocked / error shown)

test_cases.test_case: Enter Feb 29 on a leap year in Check-In succeeds
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Search form
The date entry method allows direct entry of February 29 for a leap year
steps: 1. Open the Hotels Search form
2. Enter February 29 of a known leap year in the Check_In field
3. Enter a date after February 29 of the same year in the Check_Out field
4. Enter a valid value in Destination
5. Click the Search action
test_cases.expected_result: Search submits successfully; user is redirected to Hotels_Listing_Page; the search summary displays Check-In = Feb 29 (leap year) and results are returned for the specified dates (succeeds)

test_cases.test_case: Very long Destination input (200+ chars) is accepted and displayed/truncated in summary
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Search form
steps: 1. Open the Hotels Search form
2. Enter a very long string (200+ characters) in the Destination field
3. Enter valid dates in Check_In and Check_Out
4. Click the Search action
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; user is redirected to Hotels_Listing_Page; the search summary displays the destination text (UI truncates or ellipsizes the displayed string for layout) and no inline error is shown (succeeds)

test_cases.test_case: Decimal value entered in Adults field is rejected
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Search form
steps: 1. Open the Hotels Search form
2. Enter a decimal value (e.g., one with fractional part) in the Adults field
3. Enter valid values for other required fields (Destination, dates)
4. Click the Search action
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is blocked; the Adults field shows an inline validation error indicating a whole number is required (e.g., 'Please enter a whole number') and the search does not proceed until corrected (is blocked / error shown)

test_cases.test_case: Set Min_Price greater than Max_Price is blocked
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Listing page with Left_Sidebar_Filters visible
steps: 1. Open the Price_Range filter in the Left_Sidebar_Filters
2. Enter a numeric value in Min_Price
3. Enter a smaller numeric value in Max_Price so that Min_Price > Max_Price
4. Observe the results area and filter inputs
test_cases.expected_result: The Min_Price input shows an inline error indicating Min price cannot be greater than Max price and results are not updated while the invalid relationship exists (is blocked / error shown)

test_cases.test_case: Set Min_Price equal to Max_Price applies filter (boundary equality)
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Listing page with Left_Sidebar_Filters visible
steps: 1. Open the Price_Range filter in the Left_Sidebar_Filters
2. Enter the same numeric value in Min_Price and Max_Price
3. Observe the results area
test_cases.expected_result: Filter applies successfully; results update dynamically without an error (may return hotels that match that exact price or an empty result set) and the UI reflects the applied equality filter (succeeds)

test_cases.test_case: Rapid re-submit after redirect (back button) preserves correct search and avoids duplicates
preconditions: User can perform searches and is on the Hotels Listing page after an initial search
steps: 1. Open the Hotels Search form
2. Enter valid Destination and dates
3. Click the Search action and wait for redirect to Hotels_Listing_Page
4. Immediately click the browser Back button to return to the search form
5. Without waiting, click the Search action again
test_cases.expected_result: Second submission succeeds; user is redirected to Hotels_Listing_Page for the most recent parameters; UI shows results for the latest search and no duplicate hotel cards or duplicate navigation entries are created (succeeds)

test_cases.test_case: Select a room from the Room Types list reveals booking form with price breakdown
preconditions: User on the Hotel Details page for <selected hotel> with <stay dates> and <guest count> (hotel selected from search results)
User logged in as <User> is NOT required to view details
steps: 1. In the Room Types list, click 'Select Room' on the row for <desired room type>
2. Observe the page after selection
test_cases.expected_result: Booking form is revealed populated with the selected room type and displays stay dates, guest count, and a visible price breakdown showing Room rate, Taxes, Fees, and Total

test_cases.test_case: Complete Booking Form and click Book Now navigates to Payment page
preconditions: User logged in as <User>
User on the Hotel Details page with a Selected_Room_Type and the booking form visible for <selected hotel>, <stay dates>, and <guest count>
steps: 1. Enter <First Name> in the First Name field
2. Enter <Last Name> in the Last Name field
3. Enter <valid email> in the Email field
4. Enter <phone number> in the Phone Number field
5. Optionally enter <special requests> in the Special Requests field
6. Click the 'Book Now' button
test_cases.expected_result: proceeds to the payment page

test_cases.test_case: Leave a required text field blank (representative: First Name) and submit
preconditions: Selected_Room_Type is set (a room has been selected from the Room Types list)
User is logged in
steps: 1. Open the Hotel Details page for the selected hotel
2. Select a room from the Room Types list
3. Ensure the Booking form is visible
4. Leave the First Name field blank
5. Enter <valid last name> in the Last Name field
6. Enter <valid email address> in the Email field
7. Enter <valid phone number> in the Phone Number field
8. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the First Name field indicating it is required; the form does not submit; user remains on the Hotel Details page; no booking is created and the user is not taken to the payment page.

test_cases.test_case: Submit booking with ALL required fields empty
preconditions: Selected_Room_Type is set (a room has been selected from the Room Types list)
User is logged in
steps: 1. Open the Hotel Details page for the selected hotel
2. Select a room from the Room Types list
3. Ensure the Booking form is visible
4. Leave the First Name field blank
5. Leave the Last Name field blank
6. Leave the Email field blank
7. Leave the Phone Number field blank
8. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation errors appear on the First Name, Last Name, Email, and Phone Number fields indicating each is required; the form does not submit; user remains on the Hotel Details page; no booking is created and the user is not taken to the payment page.

test_cases.test_case: Enter invalid email format and attempt to submit
preconditions: Selected_Room_Type is set (a room has been selected from the Room Types list)
User is logged in
steps: 1. Open the Hotel Details page for the selected hotel
2. Select a room from the Room Types list
3. Ensure the Booking form is visible
4. Enter <valid first name> in the First Name field
5. Enter <valid last name> in the Last Name field
6. Enter <invalid email format> in the Email field
7. Enter <valid phone number> in the Phone Number field

test_cases.test_case: Confirm Cancellation blocked when required Confirm_Cancellation checkbox is not checked
preconditions: Authenticated user
Booking selected where cancellation is permitted
steps: 1. Click the Cancel button on the Booking Detail view
2. Ensure the Confirm_Cancellation checkbox remains unchecked
3. Click the Confirm Cancellation submit action
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Confirm_Cancellation checkbox indicating it is required; cancellation is not processed; booking status does not change; no refund is initiated; no cancellation email is sent

test_cases.test_case: Confirm Cancellation fails at submit when cancellation precondition is false (submit-time block)
preconditions: Authenticated user
Booking selected where cancellation is not permitted by policy (precondition false) but UI allowed checking the box
steps: 1. Click the Cancel button on the Booking Detail view
2. Check the Confirm_Cancellation checkbox
3. Click the Confirm Cancellation submit action
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is rejected due to precondition failure (cancellation not permitted by booking type/cancellation policy); a clear error is displayed explaining cancellation is not allowed; booking remains unchanged; no refund or cancellation email is initiated

test_cases.test_case: Modify action not allowed when no booking is selected
preconditions: Authenticated user
No booking is selected in the Booking Management area
steps: 1. Attempt to click the Modify button from the Booking Management area without selecting a booking
test_cases.expected_result: Modify action is disabled or clicking it shows an inline message 'No booking selected' (or equivalent); no Modify dialog opens; user cannot proceed and no changes occur

test_cases.test_case: Attempt cancellation with Confirm_Cancellation unchecked (required checkbox boundary)
preconditions: User is authenticated
A booking is selected and booking details are visible
Cancellation is permitted by booking type and cancellation policy
steps: 1. Click the 'Cancel' action on the booking detail action bar
2. Verify the Confirm_Cancellation checkbox is present and remains unchecked
3. Click the 'Confirm Cancellation' submit button
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is blocked; Confirm_Cancellation checkbox displays a visible inline error indicating confirmation is required and the booking is not canceled (no refund initiated, no cancellation email sent)

test_cases.test_case: Confirm cancellation with Confirm_Cancellation checked exactly once before submit
preconditions: User is authenticated
A booking is selected and booking details are visible
Cancellation is permitted by booking type and cancellation policy
steps: 1. Click the 'Cancel' action on the booking detail action bar
2. Check the Confirm_Cancellation checkbox
3. Click the 'Confirm Cancellation' submit button
test_cases.expected_result: Cancellation succeeds: the booking is updated to the canceled state visible on the booking detail page; refund processing is initiated to the original payment method and a cancellation email notification is sent

test_cases.test_case: Modify booking using New_Travel_Dates set to the booking's currently scheduled travel date (date-equality boundary)
preconditions: User is authenticated
A booking is selected and booking details (including current travel dates) are visible
Modification is permitted by booking type and cancellation policy
steps: 1. Click the 'Modify' action on the booking detail action bar
2. In the New_Travel_Dates field, select the same date that is currently shown as the booked travel date
3. Fill any other required modification fields if displayed
4. Click the 'Submit Changes' button
test_cases.expected_result: Submission succeeds; the booking is updated (may be a no-op) and the booking detail page shows the travel date equal to the original date; a modification email notification is sent

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to set New_Travel_Dates to a past date (yesterday) and submit
preconditions: User is authenticated
A booking is selected and booking details are visible
Modification is permitted by booking type and cancellation policy
steps: 1. Click the 'Modify' action on the booking detail action bar
2. In the New_Travel_Dates field, enter/select <yesterday's date>
3. Click the 'Submit Changes' button
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is blocked; New_Travel_Dates displays a visible inline error indicating the selected date is in the past and changes are not submitted (no booking update, no modification email sent)

test_cases.test_case: Submit Special_Requests containing very long text (200+ characters) including emoji and special characters
preconditions: User is authenticated
A booking is selected and booking details are visible
Modification is permitted by booking type and cancellation policy
steps: 1. Click the 'Modify' action on the booking detail action bar
2. In the Special_Requests field, enter a very long text (200+ characters) containing emoji and special characters
3. Click the 'Submit Changes' button
test_cases.expected_result: Submission succeeds; booking detail page displays the Special_Requests value. If the system enforces a display/truncation limit the detail page visibly truncates the text and shows the truncated value; no system error is shown during submission

test_cases.test_case: Add multiple Traveler_Updates then remove all entries and submit (repeating_group add/remove edge)
preconditions: User is authenticated
A booking is selected and booking details are visible
Modification is permitted by booking type and cancellation policy
steps: 1. Click the 'Modify' action on the booking detail action bar
2. In the Traveler_Updates repeating group, add one item
3. For that item, fill Traveler_Identifier and Update_Details
4. Add a second item to the Traveler_Updates repeating group
5. For the second item, fill Traveler_Identifier and Update_Details
6. Remove the first added Traveler_Updates item
7. Remove the remaining Traveler_Updates item so the repeating group has zero entries
8. Click the 'Submit Changes' button
test_cases.expected_result: Submission succeeds; booking is updated without any traveler updates recorded (booking detail shows no new traveler updates). If the system required at least one entry an inline error would be shown on the repeating group, but because AST specifies no minimum the form submission succeeds

test_cases.test_case: After successful cancellation, use browser Back to attempt duplicate cancellation (rapid re-submission/back navigation edge)
preconditions: User is authenticated
A booking is selected and cancellation is permitted
A cancellation has just been completed successfully for the selected booking (refund initiated and cancellation email received)
steps: 1. From the booking detail page that now shows the canceled state, press the browser Back button
2. If the cancellation confirmation UI is shown again, attempt to click the 'Confirm Cancellation' submit button
test_cases.expected_result: Second cancellation attempt is blocked; UI displays that the booking is already canceled (no second refund initiated, no duplicate cancellation email sent), and no duplicate cancellation action is performed

test_cases.test_case: Special_Requests input with leading/trailing whitespace and only-whitespace entry behavior
preconditions: User is authenticated
A booking is selected and booking details are visible
Modification is permitted by booking type and cancellation policy
steps: 1. Click the 'Modify' action on the booking detail action bar
2. In the Special_Requests field, enter a value that has leading and trailing whitespace surrounding meaningful text
3. Click the 'Submit Changes' button
4. Repeat steps 1-3 but enter an input that is only whitespace
test_cases.expected_result: For the leading/trailing whitespace case submission succeeds; the booking detail page shows the Special_Requests value with leading/trailing whitespace trimmed (visible saved value has no extra spaces). For the only-whitespace case the submission is blocked or the system treats it as empty: an inline validation message is shown or the field is omitted from saved booking details (no meaningful Special_Requests value saved)

2. Attempt to click 'Pay Now' (or proceed with payment controls)
test_cases.expected_result: Access is blocked: user is redirected to the login/sign-in page or shown a message requiring an active session/guest checkout; payment cannot proceed until authentication or an allowed guest session is established

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to open Payment Page when no prepared booking exists

No prepared booking exists (no finalized price summary)
steps: 1. Navigate to the Payment Page URL without having a prepared booking
2. Observe available UI and attempt to click 'Pay Now' if present
test_cases.expected_result: Navigation is blocked or the page displays an error indicating there is no booking to pay (precondition failure); 'Pay Now' cannot be used and no payment may be initiated

2. Inspect the page for a 'Retry Payment' button or link

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to download Invoice/Voucher when payment is not successful

2. Attempt to click 'Download Invoice' or 'Download Voucher' if controls are present
test_cases.expected_result: Download controls are not available or clicking them is blocked; no invoice or voucher is downloaded because payment precondition 'payment must be successful' is not met

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-click of Pay Now (prevent duplicate charge)

test_cases.expected_result: First submission proceeds; second click is blocked/ignored (Pay Now is disabled or shows in-progress state); exactly one booking confirmation is created and only one confirmation email is sent

test_cases.test_case: Browser Back after successful payment then attempt to resubmit (prevent duplicate booking)
preconditions: User has completed a successful Pay Now and is on the Booking_Confirmation_Page for that booking
steps: 1. On the Booking_Confirmation_Page after a successful payment, click the browser Back button
2. On the Payment Page shown after Back, click Pay Now
test_cases.expected_result: Second submission is blocked; system prevents duplicate booking creation (no second booking appears in Booking Management) and user remains informed that the booking has already been processed; no duplicate confirmation email is sent

test_cases.test_case: Cardholder name with leading and trailing whitespace is trimmed on save

Payment_Method is not yet selected

2. Select Payment_Method = Credit/Debit Card
3. Enter Cardholder_Name = <value with leading and trailing whitespace>
4. Enter a valid Card_Number
5. Set Expiration_Date = <valid future date>
6. Enter a valid CVV
7. Click Pay Now
test_cases.expected_result: Payment submission succeeds; Booking_Confirmation_Page displays the saved Cardholder_Name with leading and trailing whitespace removed (trimmed)

test_cases.test_case: Rapid consecutive Retry Payment clicks after a failure (prevent concurrent retries)
preconditions: A prepared booking exists with a finalized price summary and user has an active session
A prior payment attempt for the booking has failed and Payment_Result == Failed (Retry Payment button is visible)
steps: 1. On the Payment Page where Retry Payment is visible, ensure card fields are filled with valid values
2. Click Retry Payment
3. Immediately click Retry Payment again while the first retry is in progress
test_cases.expected_result: First retry request is processed; the immediate second click is blocked/ignored while the first is in progress; only one retry request is executed at a time (no concurrent duplicate retry attempts processed)

test_cases.expected_result: Displayed prices on the visible page update in real-time to reflect the selected currency (currency symbol and amounts update) while the current search results and filter context remain visible and unchanged; preference saved to session/cookie for current browsing session

test_cases.test_case: Guest: change currency with browser cookies/session disabled — persistence blocked
preconditions: Browser cookies/session storage disabled
User is not authenticated (guest)
A site page is loaded with the top navigation visible
steps: 1. Disable cookies and session storage in the browser
2. Open a site page where the top navigation is visible
3. Confirm the user is logged out (guest)
4. Click the Currency selector in the top navigation
5. Select <new currency> from the list
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error appears adjacent to the Currency selector indicating preferences cannot be saved because cookies/session storage are disabled; the change is not persisted to session/cookie and prices do not update (the page continues displaying prices in the previous currency). No preference is saved for the browsing session.

steps: 1. Disable cookies and session storage in the browser

test_cases.test_case: Top navigation hidden / not present — selectors not accessible
preconditions: A site page is loaded where the top navigation is not visible (e.g., full-screen modal or page variant)
User may be authenticated or guest
steps: 1. Open a site page variant where the top navigation is not visible
2. Attempt to locate the Currency selector in the top navigation
3. Attempt to locate the Language selector in the top navigation
test_cases.expected_result: Currency and Language selectors are not visible or accessible in the UI (no controls present in the top navigation area); user cannot change currency or language from this page and no preference change action is possible.

test_cases.test_case: Change currency causes loss of current search context — change should be blocked (retain context)
preconditions: A site search results page is loaded with an active search context (filters, dates, location) visible in the UI
User is authenticated or guest with session support
steps: 1. On a search results page, set identifiable search context and filters (e.g., apply <search filters/date range>)
2. Note the current search context visibly displayed on the page
3. Click the Currency selector in the top navigation
4. Select <new currency> from the list
test_cases.expected_result: The search context and filters remain unchanged and visible after the currency change; prices update without clearing or resetting filters. If the UI attempts to clear the search context, the change must be rejected and an inline warning should appear near the Currency selector stating the search context would be lost (preference not applied). The final state must preserve the original search context.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to persist currency preference to user profile when not authenticated — profile save must not occur
preconditions: User is not authenticated (guest)
A site page is loaded with the top navigation visible
steps: 1. Ensure no user is signed in (guest session)
2. Click the Currency selector in the top navigation
3. Select <new currency> from the list
4. Sign in as the same user account that would normally have a profile preference (perform login)
5. Open the user's profile preferences page
test_cases.expected_result: The user's profile preference for currency remains as the previous profile value (e.g., <existing profile currency>); the change made while unauthenticated was not saved to the user profile. There is no indication in the profile that <new currency> was persisted to the profile (precondition 'user is authenticated' prevented profile persistence). The temporary selection may have applied to the guest session only but was not written to profile.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to persist language preference to user profile when not authenticated — profile save must not occur
preconditions: User is not authenticated (guest)
A site page is loaded with the top navigation visible
steps: 1. Ensure no user is signed in (guest session)
2. Click the Language selector in the top navigation
3. Select <new language> from the list
4. Sign in as the same user account that would normally have a profile preference (perform login)
5. Open the user's profile preferences page
test_cases.expected_result: The user's profile preference for language remains as the previous profile value (e.g., <existing profile language>); the change made while unauthenticated was not saved to the user profile. The language change performed as a guest did not persist to the profile after login, demonstrating the Persist Preference to Profile precondition was enforced.

test_cases.test_case: Rapid alternating currency selections — final selection applied without mixed prices
preconditions: A site page is loaded with the top navigation visible and price elements rendered
User is either authenticated or unauthenticated (does not matter for this test)
steps: 1. Click the Currency selector in the top navigation
2. Select a different currency (Currency B)
3. Within one second, open the Currency selector again
4. Select a different currency (Currency C)
