test_cases.test_case: Open Terms and Conditions from a promotional banner
preconditions: User logged in as <guest or authenticated>
User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
steps: 1. Identify a promotional banner for a deal
2. Click the Terms and Conditions link on that promotional banner
test_cases.expected_result: Terms and Conditions panel or page opens and displays the promotional banner's full terms and conditions content (opens the terms and conditions for the selected offer)

test_cases.test_case: Subscribe to newsletter with a valid email
preconditions: User logged in as <guest or authenticated>
User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
steps: 1. Enter <valid email> in the Email field of the Newsletter subscription form
2. Click the Subscribe button
test_cases.expected_result: A confirmation banner or toast appears confirming the email subscription and indicating the email has been subscribed to receive future exclusive deals (subscribes email to receive future exclusive deals)

test_cases.test_case: Click Book Now on an offer card with no filters selected
preconditions: User logged in as <guest or authenticated>
User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
Service_Type == null AND Destination == null AND Travel_Dates == null (no filters selected)
steps: 1. Identify an offer card in the Offers list
2. Click the Book Now button on that offer card
test_cases.expected_result: Browser is redirected to a pre-filled booking/search page for the selected offer; the page displays the offer details and shows a visible promo-applied indicator or promo code field despite no filters having been selected (applies promotional code to booking flow or redirects to a pre-filled search with discounted rates applied)

test_cases.test_case: Open Terms and Conditions from an offer card with no filters selected
preconditions: User logged in as <guest or authenticated>
User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
Service_Type == null AND Destination == null AND Travel_Dates == null (no filters selected)
steps: 1. Identify an offer card in the Offers list
2. Click the Terms and Conditions link on that offer card
test_cases.expected_result: Terms and Conditions panel or page opens and displays the selected offer's full terms and conditions content (opens the terms and conditions for the selected offer)

test_cases.test_case: Subscribe with Email left blank
preconditions: User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
steps: 1. Navigate to the Offers page
2. Leave the Email field blank in the Newsletter Subscription form
3. Click the Subscribe button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Email field indicating it is required; the form does not submit and the email is not subscribed (no success message or change in subscription state).

test_cases.test_case: Subscribe with invalid email format
preconditions: User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
steps: 1. Navigate to the Offers page
2. Enter <invalid email format> in the Email field
3. Click the Subscribe button
test_cases.expected_result: Email field displays a validation error: 'must be a valid email address' (as specified by the constraint); the form does not submit and the email is not subscribed.

test_cases.test_case: Subscribe when booking/search services are unavailable (precondition failure)
preconditions: Offers page is reachable but booking/search services are unavailable (precondition not met).
steps: 1. Open the Offers page in a state where booking/search services are unavailable
2. Enter <valid email> in the Email field
3. Click the Subscribe button
test_cases.expected_result: Subscribe action is blocked; a visible global error banner or inline message appears indicating subscription cannot be completed because required services are unavailable; Email is not subscribed and no success state is shown.

test_cases.test_case: Apply Filters when offers data/filters not loaded (precondition failure)
preconditions: Offers page is open but offer data and filters are not loaded (precondition not met).
steps: 1. Open the Offers page where the offers data and filters have not finished loading or are absent
2. Select <Service_Type> from the Service Type dropdown (optional)
3. Enter <Destination> in the Destination field (optional)
4. Click the Apply Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Apply Filters does not execute; the offers list remains unchanged; a visible error indicator (global banner or inline message) is shown stating filters cannot be applied because offers data/filters are not available.

test_cases.test_case: Book Now on an offer when booking/search services are unavailable (precondition failure)
preconditions: Offers page is open but booking/search services are unavailable (precondition not met).
steps: 1. Open the Offers page where booking/search services are unavailable
2. Click the Book Now button on any offer in the Offers List
test_cases.expected_result: Booking action is blocked; user remains on the Offers page; a visible inline error near the selected offer or a global message appears indicating booking cannot proceed because booking/search services are unavailable; no redirect or promo code application occurs.

test_cases.test_case: Book Now on a promotional banner when booking/search services are unavailable (precondition failure)
preconditions: Offers page is open but booking/search services are unavailable (precondition not met).
steps: 1. Open the Offers page where booking/search services are unavailable
2. Click the Book Now button on any Promotional Banner
test_cases.expected_result: Action is blocked; user is not redirected and no promotional code is applied; a visible error (inline near the banner or a global banner) indicates booking cannot proceed because required services are unavailable.

test_cases.test_case: Apply Filters with invalid Travel Dates input
preconditions: User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
steps: 1. Navigate to the Offers page
2. Enter <invalid/impossible date> in the Travel Dates field
3. Click the Apply Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Travel Dates field displays an inline validation error indicating the date is invalid or not parsable; Apply Filters does not execute and the offers list remains unfiltered.

test_cases.test_case: Newsletter subscribe with leading/trailing whitespace in Email
preconditions: User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
Newsletter subscription form is visible
steps: 1. Click into the Email field of the Newsletter_Subscription_Form
2. Enter an otherwise-valid email address with leading and trailing whitespace around it
3. Click the Subscribe button
test_cases.expected_result: Subscription succeeds; inline success confirmation is shown and the displayed saved email in the confirmation UI is the email with leading/trailing whitespace trimmed

test_cases.test_case: Newsletter subscribe with emoji / unsupported unicode inside Email
preconditions: User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
Newsletter subscription form is visible
steps: 1. Click into the Email field of the Newsletter_Subscription_Form
2. Enter an email-like string that includes emoji or non-standard Unicode characters in the local-part
3. Click the Subscribe button
test_cases.expected_result: Subscription is blocked / error shown; the Email field shows the inline validation error "must be a valid email address"

test_cases.test_case: Apply Filters with Travel_Dates set to today's date
preconditions: User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
Service_Type and Destination may be empty or filled
steps: 1. Click the Travel_Dates field in the Filters_Form
2. Select today's date
3. Click the Apply Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Apply Filters succeeds; Offers_List refreshes and displays offers valid for the selected (today) date (offers list updates visibly)

test_cases.test_case: Apply Filters with Travel_Dates set far in the future
preconditions: User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
Service_Type and Destination may be empty or filled
steps: 1. Click the Travel_Dates field in the Filters_Form
2. Select a travel date far in the future (several years ahead)
3. Click the Apply Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Apply Filters succeeds; the offers list refreshes and the UI explicitly displays a no-results message for the selected dates (e.g., 'no offers available for selected dates'), indicating the filter applied but returned no matches

test_cases.test_case: Click Book Now on an offer when no filters are selected
preconditions: User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
Service_Type == null AND Destination == null AND Travel_Dates == null (no filters selected)
steps: 1. Identify an offer card in Offers_List
2. Click the Book Now button on that offer card
test_cases.expected_result: Book Now action succeeds; user is redirected to the booking/search flow and a visible indicator shows the promotional code was applied (e.g., a 'Promo code applied' banner or discounted rate shown on the redirected page)

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-click of Book Now on an offer card
preconditions: User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
An offer card is visible in Offers_List
steps: 1. Focus on a single offer card's Book Now button
2. Click the Book Now button twice in rapid succession
test_cases.expected_result: First Book Now click succeeds and initiates a single redirect to the booking/search flow; the second rapid click is ignored and no duplicate redirect or duplicate promo application occurs (UI shows one redirected page and one applied promo indicator)

test_cases.test_case: Apply Filters with an excessively long and unicode-heavy Destination value
preconditions: User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.
Filters_Form is visible
steps: 1. Click into the Destination field in the Filters_Form
2. Enter a very long destination string (200+ characters) containing special/unicode characters
3. Click the Apply Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Apply Filters succeeds; the UI trims/truncates the displayed Destination in the filters UI to the allowed display length (the filter chip or field shows the truncated/escaped value) and the offers list refreshes using the trimmed value (visible results or a no-results message appear accordingly)

test_cases.test_case: Click Logout from Dashboard redirects to Home and ends session
preconditions: User logged in as <Authenticated User>
User is on the <Dashboard>
steps: 1. Click the Logout button in the account/navigation area
test_cases.expected_result: Terminate current session, clear sensitive session data, redirect the user to the Home page; subsequent attempts to access protected pages redirect to the Login page.

test_cases.test_case: After Logout, direct navigation to a protected page redirects to Login
preconditions: User logged in as <Authenticated User>
User is on any protected page or the <Dashboard>
steps: 1. Click the Logout button in the account/navigation area
2. Enter <protected page URL> in the browser address bar and press Enter
test_cases.expected_result: The Login page is displayed and shows the <Login form>, indicating the user must re-authenticate before accessing protected pages.

test_cases.test_case: Unauthenticated user cannot see or use the Logout control (precondition not met)
preconditions: User is not authenticated (no active session)
steps: 1. Ensure the user is not authenticated (clear cookies / open a new browser session with no login).
2. Navigate to the site and open the main navigation Account/Login area where Logout would normally appear.
test_cases.expected_result: The Account/Login area does not display a 'Logout' control; the 'Login' / 'Sign in' control is visible instead. The user cannot initiate a logout because there is no active session (no session termination occurs).

test_cases.test_case: Direct access to the logout endpoint while unauthenticated is blocked and redirects to Login
preconditions: User is not authenticated (no active session)
steps: 1. Ensure the user is not authenticated (no active session).
2. In the browser address bar, navigate directly to the logout endpoint URL: <logout URL>.
test_cases.expected_result: Browser is redirected to the Login page (URL becomes '<login URL>'); the Login form is displayed. The logout action does not proceed because there was no active session (no session clearing occurs).

test_cases.test_case: After performing Logout, attempts to access a protected page are blocked (postcondition enforced)
preconditions: User is authenticated with an active session
steps: 1. Authenticate as a user to create an active session (log in).
2. Click the Logout button.
3. Wait for redirect to the Home page to complete.
4. In the browser address bar, navigate to a protected page URL: <protected page URL>.
test_cases.expected_result: Navigation to the protected page is blocked: browser is redirected to the Login page (URL becomes '<login URL>'); the protected content is not displayed and the Login form is visible. The user's session remains terminated (no access to protected areas).

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-click of Logout button (duplicate requests)
preconditions: User is authenticated and is on a protected page or dashboard.
steps: 1. Click the Logout button.
2. Immediately click the Logout button again (before the first redirect completes).
test_cases.expected_result: First logout action succeeds: user is redirected to the Home page and protected UI elements are removed. The second click sends a duplicate request that is ignored/handled idempotently and results in no server error or second session; the UI remains on Home page (no additional entity created).

test_cases.test_case: Browser back navigation after logout
preconditions: User is authenticated and is on a protected page.
steps: 1. Click the Logout button.
2. On the Home page after redirect, click the browser Back button to navigate to the previously viewed protected page.
test_cases.expected_result: Navigation to the protected page is blocked: the protected page request is intercepted and the user is redirected to the Login page (access is blocked).

test_cases.test_case: Open protected URL in a new tab after logging out in original tab
preconditions: User is authenticated in Tab A and a protected resource URL is known.
steps: 1. In Tab A, click the Logout button.
2. In a new browser tab (Tab B), navigate directly to a protected page URL and press Enter.
test_cases.expected_result: Access to the protected URL in Tab B is blocked: the browser is redirected to the Login page (access is blocked) rather than showing protected content.

test_cases.test_case: Perform an authenticated action from a stale (already-open) tab after logout in another tab
preconditions: User is authenticated with Tab A and Tab B both open on protected pages (Tab B has the page loaded earlier).
steps: 1. In Tab A, click the Logout button.
2. In Tab B (which still shows authenticated UI), click a button that triggers a protected action (e.g., Save or Update).
test_cases.expected_result: The action from Tab B is blocked: the server rejects the request as unauthorized and the client redirects the user to the Login page (protected action is not applied and access is blocked).

test_cases.test_case: Click Logout after the session has already expired (idle timeout)
preconditions: User was previously authenticated but the session has expired due to idle timeout (user is still on a protected page but backend session is invalid).
steps: 1. Click the Logout button.
test_cases.expected_result: Logout action succeeds (no server error): user is redirected to the Home page and no sensitive session data remains. Subsequent navigation to protected pages redirects to the Login page.

test_cases.test_case: In-flight authenticated request interrupted by Logout (race condition)
preconditions: User is authenticated and initiates a long-running authenticated request from a protected page (e.g., a large save or upload).
steps: 1. Start the long-running authenticated request (e.g., click Save that triggers a backend operation).
2. While the request is still in progress, click the Logout button.
3. Wait for the in-flight request to complete or return.
test_cases.expected_result: The in-flight request is blocked/treated as unauthorized once the session is terminated: the request is rejected (no protected update is applied) and the client redirects the user to the Login page or shows an authentication-required view (action is blocked).

module_context.summary: The Home Page & Search provides a unified search widget with tabs for Hotels, Flights, Tours, and Cars that collects service-specific criteria and validates input before redirecting to result listings.
module_context.where_it_fits: This module is the application landing area reached via the Home top-navigation item and serves as the entry point for discovery workflows (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) that then route to their respective Search & Listing pages; it coexists with the global top navigation (Offers, Blog, Account) and precedes authenticated dashboard and booking flows.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: User is on the Home page (landing page) with a search tab selected or defaulted to one of Hotels/Flights/Tours/Cars and ready to enter required search criteria.

module_context.summary: Collects and validates user personal and contact information to create a new account and either log the user in or initiate email verification.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the Home page via the Account/Login option in the top navigation, this module is part of the onboarding flow that leads into the authenticated User Dashboard and booking lifecycle. It precedes features like Booking Management and Payment Processing by provisioning an authenticated user account.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: Visitor is unauthenticated and attempting to create an account (no existing registered account for the provided email) and has access to the registration form via Home -> Account/Login.

module_context.summary: Handles user authentication via email/password and optional social providers, including error feedback, remember-me handling, and CAPTCHA on repeated failures.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Account/Login and reachable when a visitor attempts to access protected pages; successful authentication transitions the user into the Dashboard and booking/account flows within the main navigation (Home, Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars, etc.).
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: User is not authenticated (visiting Account/Login or redirected from a protected page)

module_context.summary: Allows users to request a password reset by submitting their email so the system sends a 24-hour time-limited reset link if the address exists.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation's Account/Login area, this module is part of the authentication lifecycle alongside User Login and User Registration and leads to the password reset page and back to Login after completion.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: User is unauthenticated and has access to the Account/Login area and the email address associated with their account (or is attempting recovery for an unknown address).

module_context.summary: Provides a hotel search form and dynamic listing of matching hotels with filters, sorting, and booking entry points.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the site's main navigation under Hotels or via the Home page search widget tabs, this module serves as the entry point for discovering available hotels and precedes the Hotel Details & Booking and Payment Processing flows in the booking lifecycle.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: User is on the Home or Hotels section and has specified search parameters (destination and dates) or is prepared to enter them; user may be guest or authenticated.

module_context.summary: Displays comprehensive hotel information (gallery, description, location, room types, pricing, reviews, and policies) and presents a room selection and booking form with a detailed price breakdown.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation via Hotels and from the Home Page search results, this module is the step after Hotels Search & Listing and precedes Payment Processing in the booking lifecycle; it feeds selected room and guest details into the payment flow and links to the User Dashboard for booking history after completion.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: A specific hotel has been selected from Hotels Search & Listing (stay dates and guest count chosen); user authentication is required to complete the booking (viewing details may not require login).

module_context.summary: Provides a search form for flight itineraries and a results listing showing available flights with details, filters, and sorting options.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Flights or via the home page search widget tabs, this module sits between initial trip input and booking: users submit flight search criteria here and are shown listings before proceeding to Flight Booking and Payment Processing.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: User has arrived at the Flights section (from Home or top nav) and has entered valid search criteria (trip type, departure/arrival cities, dates, passenger counts, cabin class).

module_context.summary: Presents a full flight itinerary and fare breakdown while collecting validated passenger and lead contact details (including passports, DOB, optional meal and seat preferences) prior to payment.
module_context.where_it_fits: Reached from the top navigation Flights option or from the Flights Search & Listing results, this module is the booking-step that follows flight selection and precedes Payment Processing within the booking flow.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: A specific flight has been selected from Flights Search & Listing and the session contains the chosen itinerary, passenger count, cabin class, and calculated fares; user session is active (logged-in or guest).

module_context.summary: Provides a search form and results listing for available tours, showing cards with images, key details (destination, duration, price, availability, rating) and sidebar filters and sorting options.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation (Tours) and the Home page search widget tabs, this module handles the discovery phase for tours by collecting search criteria and presenting filtered listings before users proceed to tour details and booking. It sits alongside other search/listing modules (Hotels, Flights, Cars) and feeds into the Tour Details & Booking flow.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: User has navigated to the Tours section (via top nav or Home search widget) and has entered or will enter required search criteria such as destination and travel dates.

module_context.summary: Displays full tour information including images, day-by-day itinerary, inclusions/exclusions, departure dates, pricing, reviews, terms, and a booking form for traveler details and cost breakdown.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Tours or via the Tours Search & Listing results, this module presents detailed information after a tour is chosen and precedes the booking flow handled by Booking Management and Payment Processing. It is part of the user journey that starts from the Home search widget or Tours listing and moves toward account/checkout steps in the dashboard and payment modules.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: A specific tour has been selected from Tours Search & Listing; the tour's availability and departure dates are loaded and the user session is either authenticated or will trigger a redirect to Login.

module_context.summary: Provides a car rental search form and a dynamic listing of available vehicles grouped by category with detailed attributes, pricing, and filtering options.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the main navigation under Cars or via the home page search widget's Cars tab, this module handles the search input and displays results before booking and payment flows; it sits alongside other transport modules like Flights and Tours and feeds into the Car Booking and Payment Processing modules.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: Visitor has selected the Cars section (or used the home search widget) and has provided pick-up/drop-off locations and dates/times; user may be guest or authenticated.

module_context.summary: Displays chosen vehicle and rental details with pricing, driver information form, optional add-ons and insurance selection, and confirmation controls to proceed to payment.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Cars or via the Home Page search widget's Cars tab, this module is the step after Cars Search & Listing where a selected vehicle and rental options are finalized before Payment Processing and Booking Management. It ties into the global navigation flow that includes Cars Search & Listing → Car Booking → Payment Processing and then the User Dashboard/Booking Management for post-booking actions.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: A specific car and rental period (pick-up/drop-off locations and times) have been selected; user contact information available and user is either authenticated or proceeding as guest per site policy.

module_context.summary: Displays country-specific visa requirements and provides a visa application form with document upload and tracking of application status.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Visa, this module sits alongside other booking-related sections (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) and integrates with the User Dashboard and Bookings area for application status and history. It is part of the end-to-end travel planning flow where users research requirements and submit service requests tied to their account.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: User is logged in (authenticated) so applications can be submitted and tracked in the dashboard

module_context.summary: A post-authentication hub that displays and manages a user’s bookings, profile, wallet/credits, wishlist, reviews, and account settings in one place.
module_context.where_it_fits: Reached from the top navigation Account/Login after successful authentication, the Dashboard is the central user area following activity initiated from Home (search widget) or section-specific flows like Hotels, Flights, Tours, and Cars; it acts as the lifecycle hub for managing bookings, payments, and account preferences.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: Authenticated (logged-in) user with an active session.

module_context.summary: Displays detailed information for a specific booking (confirmation number, service and traveler details, payment and status) and provides options to modify or cancel the booking where permitted, with automated email notifications for status changes.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the User Dashboard/Booking Management area after authentication, this module is part of the post-booking lifecycle for managing existing reservations discovered via the main navigation (Account/Login → Dashboard → Booking Management). It complements listing and detail flows for Hotels, Flights, Tours, and Cars by handling downstream changes and cancellations.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: Authenticated user with at least one existing booking selected (booking details available and subject to type-specific modification/cancellation rules)

module_context.summary: Handles collection and processing of payment for a prepared booking, presenting a detailed price breakdown, multiple payment methods, and post-payment confirmation or error handling.
module_context.where_it_fits: Located at the end of the booking flow after a user selects and reviews a Hotel, Flight, Tour, or Car (accessed from the Home search widget or respective section in the top navigation), it serves as the checkout/transaction step before the booking confirmation page and invoice delivery. The module is reachable from any booking path (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) and integrates with the User Dashboard/Booking Management for saved payment methods and booking records.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: A prepared booking exists with a finalized price summary (base price, taxes, fees, discounts) and the user has an active session or guest booking session allowing checkout.

module_context.summary: Selection controls for currency and language that update displayed prices and the site interface in real-time and persist preferences to the user profile or session/cookies.
module_context.where_it_fits: Located in the top navigation bar (right side) and available across the Home, Search, and all section pages; it ties into the Home Page & Search and all booking/listing modules so prices, labels, and content reflect the chosen currency and language throughout the user journey.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: A site page is loaded with the top navigation visible; user is either authenticated (profile available) or a guest with session/cookie support enabled.

module_context.summary: Provides a consistent set of dynamic filtering and sorting controls for listing result pages, allowing users to narrow results by common and listing-specific criteria and see real-time result counts and active-filter summaries.
module_context.where_it_fits: This module appears on listing pages reached from the top navigation (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) and from the home page search widget; it augments search results by offering left‑sidebar filters, sorting controls above results, and active-filter summaries during the browsing and booking discovery flow.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: A search has been performed and listing results for a selected category (Hotels, Flights, Tours, or Cars) are displayed

module_context.summary: Displays aggregate scores and individual guest reviews for listings, including category-specific ratings, written comments, photos, and filtering by rating, date, or traveler type.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from listing and detail pages within the Hotels/Flights/Tours/Cars sections of the main navigation and exposed on detail pages as a dedicated Reviews section; review submission is also reachable via the user Dashboard or post-stay email prompts after bookings. It complements search/listing workflows by surfacing social proof and post-stay feedback during the booking lifecycle.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: Viewing: public access (no login required); Submitting: authenticated user with a completed/recorded booking (post-stay).

module_context.summary: Displays promotional banners and featured deal cards with discount details, validity, terms, filtering by service/destination/dates, and actions that apply promo codes or redirect to pre-filled booking searches.
module_context.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Offers and via homepage promotions/search widget, this section surfaces time-limited, seasonal and last-minute promotions across services (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) and integrates with the booking flows by applying discounts or pre-filling searches. It complements the main search/listing modules and influences subsequent Payment Processing and Booking Management steps.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: User (guest or authenticated) is on the Offers page with offer data and filters loaded and booking/search services available to apply promotions.

module_context.summary: Ends the authenticated session by clearing sensitive session data and returning the user to the public home page.
module_context.where_it_fits: Located under the Account/Login area of the main navigation and accessible from the user dashboard; it is used at the end of a user's authenticated session to ensure protected areas require re-authentication. After logout, attempts to access protected pages are routed to the login page.
module_context.assumed_state_on_entry: User is authenticated with an active session (logged in) and may be on the dashboard or any protected page.
